meta.title: Ruminococcus bromii sp. n. and Emendation of the Description of Ruminococcus Sijpestein
meta.section: Original Papers Relating to Systematic Bacteriology

abstractHtml: Ruminococcus bromii sp. n. is described. It grows anaerobically, produces ethanol and acetic and formic acids from fermentable carbohydrates, and has complex nutritional requirements, indicating that it is a member of the genus Ruminococcus, which is here emended.
